title: AI nail lamp: skin-friendly manicure with artificial intelligence?
description: UV lamps for curing gel nails are certainly high up on the list of products where you wouldn't expect to find artificial intelligence. But O Nail is now doing just that - and promises some advantages.

title: Study says AI chatbots are increasingly ignoring humans, but it isn’t quite Skynet yet
description: AI has a habit of bluffing, and you’re not alone in catching it.

title: AMD Ryzen AI 7 445 disappoints in first in-house benchmarks
description: Don't be fooled by the "Ryzen AI 7" name — this is little more than a rebrand of the existing Ryzen AI 5 340 masquerading as a higher-end option.

title: Kingdom Come: Deliverance 2 developer claims AI is replacing them
description: A translator who worked on Kingdom Come: Deliverance 2 claims Warhorse Studios will use AI for translations going forward

title: New AI tool aims to demystify Canberra's complex planning laws
description: Could AI solve the ACT's development application wait times?
